---
title: "Global Numbering Reset Test"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
custom-amsthm:
  - key: tsk
    name: Task
    numbering-style: global
filters:
  - custom-amsthm-environments
---

This test verifies that global numbering resets between renders.

::: {#tsk-first}
## First Task

This should always be Task 1.
:::

::: {#tsk-second}
## Second Task

This should always be Task 2.
:::

::: {#tsk-third}
## Third Task

This should always be Task 3.
:::

References: @tsk-first, @tsk-second, @tsk-third
